overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural village at sunset. The character travels from muddy fields through narrow village streets lined with thatched-roof wooden cottages, passing villagers, and exiting past a great oak tree into open countryside. The scene features dramatic red sunset lighting and high-quality game engine graphics.

ground surface transitions from muddy terrain to wooden plank walkway
encountering a woman villager in a green dress walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through muddy terrain toward the village, approaching the wooden buildings

rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the village path

wooden plank walkway forming the central path through the village entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the rural village from open muddy fields at sunset. The ground transitions from wet mud to wooden planks as he enters the village proper, passing a woman in a green dress. Thatched-roof cottages and wooden fences line the path while the dramatic red sky fills the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street between timber-framed cottages

events.description: child villager visible playing ahead in the village square near a well

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the narrow village streets between wooden houses, approaching a child playing in the path

notable_agents.action: child in light clothing playing with arms outstretched in the village path ahead

entered.detail: timber-framed cottage with detailed woodwork and thatched roof on the right side
stone well structure in the center of the village square

segments.scene_description: Walking through the enclosed village streets, Geralt passes between closely spaced wooden cottages with thatched roofs. The ground is now packed dirt rather than mud. A child plays in the path ahead near a stone well, while the sunset creates long shadows between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: village exit with ancient oak tree and open countryside

events.description: passing the great oak tree and transitioning from village to open countryside

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaving the village behind, walking past the great oak tree on the right as the landscape opens up

entered.detail: massive ancient oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches dominating the right side
dense forest visible on the horizon beyond the village exit

segments.scene_description: Exiting the village, the scene opens up to countryside with a massive ancient oak tree on the right. The wooden cottages fall behind as the path continues through open terrain toward a distant forest. The red sunset sky dominates the horizon as Geralt leaves the settlement behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the muddy outskirts of a rural village into its narrow heart and back out into the open countryside under a dramatic red sunset. It begins in wet, muddy fields, with the terrain transitioning to wooden planks as the camera enters the settlement and passes a woman in a green dress beside thatched-roof cottages. As the path shifts from planks to packed dirt, the scene becomes more enclosed between closely spaced wooden buildings and a stone well where a child plays, casting long shadows across the ground. The environment then opens up again as the camera leaves the village behind, passing a massive ancient oak tree on the right. Finally, the wooden cottages recede into the distance as the path leads through open terrain toward a far-off forest beneath the dominating red horizon.
